title: Aggregate Library
description: The 'lib/aggregate' directory houses the core components of Apache Hadoop's ValueAggregator library. This library provides a flexible framework for custom aggregation of map output values. The `ValueAggregatorDescriptor.java` class dynamically loads and instantiates user-defined aggregators, enabling tailored aggregation logic. `ValueAggregatorBaseDescriptor.java` offers a base for user-defined aggregators, while `ValueAggregatorCombiner.java` implements a generic combiner for the Aggregate class. `ValueAggregatorJobBase.java` is an abstract class for common functionalities of map, reduce, and combiner classes. Lastly, `ValueAggregatorReducer.java` defines a reducer for the ValueAggregator library, aggregating values based on types and generating reports. These components collaborate to provide a robust, customizable aggregation solution, embodying the Strategy design pattern by allowing different aggregation strategies to be used interchangeably.

raw_response:
TITLE: Aggregate Library

DESCRIPTION: The 'lib/aggregate' directory houses the core components of Apache Hadoop's ValueAggregator library. This library provides a flexible framework for custom aggregation of map output values. The `ValueAggregatorDescriptor.java` class dynamically loads and instantiates user-defined aggregators, enabling tailored aggregation logic. `ValueAggregatorBaseDescriptor.java` offers a base for user-defined aggregators, while `ValueAggregatorCombiner.java` implements a generic combiner for the Aggregate class. `ValueAggregatorJobBase.java` is an abstract class for common functionalities of map, reduce, and combiner classes. Lastly, `ValueAggregatorReducer.java` defines a reducer for the ValueAggregator library, aggregating values based on types and generating reports. These components collaborate to provide a robust, customizable aggregation solution, embodying the Strategy design pattern by allowing different aggregation strategies to be used interchangeably.
